keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Mandatory. List of role or skill keywords to search.

minimumSalary.title: Minimum Salary
minimumSalary.description: Minimum annual salary filter in local currency units.

maximumSalary.title: Maximum Salary
maximumSalary.description: Maximum annual salary filter in local currency units.

employmentType.title: Employment Type
employmentType.description: Allowed employment types (for example Full Time, Contract).

maxResults.title: Maximum Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of final job records to return.

enableAIScoring.title: Enable AI Scoring
enableAIScoring.description: Enable optional AI enrichment and scoring when provider keys are available.

removeDuplicates.title: Remove Duplicates
removeDuplicates.description: Remove duplicate jobs by company/title/location/url matching.

includeCompanyResearch.title: Include Company Research
includeCompanyResearch.description: Attempt additional public company enrichment where available.

includeHiringManager.title: Include Hiring Manager
includeHiringManager.description: Attempt to include recruiter or hiring manager fields where available.

includeMockData.title: Include Mock Data
includeMockData.description: Enable only for local debugging. Keep false for real job output.

includeCompanies.title: Include Companies
includeCompanies.description: Only include jobs from these companies.

excludeRecruiters.title: Exclude Recruiters
excludeRecruiters.description: Exclude jobs posted by these recruiters when recruiter data is available.

excludeKeywords.title: Exclude Keywords
excludeKeywords.description: Exclude jobs containing these keywords in title or description.

blacklist.title: Blacklist
blacklist.description: Global exclusion terms applied across company, title, and description.

postedThisWeek.title: Posted This Week
postedThisWeek.description: Prioritize jobs posted in the last 7 days.

postedThisMonth.title: Posted This Month
postedThisMonth.description: Prioritize jobs posted in the last 30 days.

customSearchUrls.title: Custom Search URLs
customSearchUrls.description: Additional direct source URLs (for example Greenhouse boards) to crawl.

aiProvider.title: AI Provider
aiProvider.description: AI provider selection: auto, openai, gemini, or none.
